category_sources: Official homepage says fragroute implements packet manipulation attacks for testing network intrusion detection systems, firewalls, and TCP/IP stack behavior.
source_facts.description says it intercepts, modifies, and rewrites egress traffic.
docs_sources: Official fragroute(8) and fragtest(8) manpage text files are linked from the project homepage.
Official homepage has a Documentation section linking INSTALL and manpages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage provides release tarball and documentation, but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists packet delay, duplication, dropping, fragmentation, overlap, reordering, source-routing, and IDS/firewall testing uses.
